title: Agricultural workers – Work temporarily in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Agricultural workers – Work temporarily in Canada
How you apply to work as an agricultural worker depends on how you’re hired.
If you’re hired through the Seasonal Agricultural Worker Program (SAWP), you can work for any SAWP employer in Canada.
Other agricultural workers can apply for an employer-specific work permit. This means you can work only for the employer named on your work permit.
Find out how to apply through the : Option 1 of 2
Seasonal Agricultural Worker Program (SAWP)
Find out how to apply as : Option 2 of 2
Other agricultural workers
